rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or clauses without changing unrelated architecture
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Place component type contracts in component type annexes and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators such as and, or, not(...), and implication =>
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Place component type contracts in component type annexes and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators such as and, or, not(...), and implication =>
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not add architecture to fix a guarantee expression with type <error>
Do not use invalid AGREE type names like integer or boolean
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
